title: Order
description: A data generation order created from a basket. Orders are processed asynchronously and produce downloadable output files.

basketId.description: The basket from which the order was generated.

status.description: Current processing status of the order.

fileType.description: The output file format for the order.

downloadUrl.description: URL to download the order output. Available only when status is Complete.

errorMessage.description: Error description if the order failed. Present only when status is Failed.
